message:
refactor: extract InlineAIAssist result types from CardFactoryModal.tsx (#8608) [part 5] (#8904)

Move the T1AssistResult / T2AssistResult interfaces and their
validateT1AssistResult / validateT2AssistResult helpers out of
CardFactoryModal.tsx and into a new sibling module
cardFactoryAssistTypes.ts.

These mirror the pattern established in #8838, which extracted the
larger AiCardT1Result / AiCardT2Result types into cardFactoryAiTypes.ts.
The Assist types are the partial-edit siblings: they describe responses
from InlineAIAssist (which patches an in-progress card) rather than
AiGenerationPanel (which generates a full card definition).

Net change in CardFactoryModal.tsx: -27 LOC (1383 -> 1356).
New file: 39 LOC.

Zero behavior change. tsc clean, eslint output unchanged from main
(same 1 pre-existing error + 11 pre-existing warnings, all in code
not touched by this PR), and the 28 tests across the 4 test files
that touch CardFactoryModal continue to pass.

Refs #8608

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
